title: Mandalay Bay Guest Directory
subtitle: Lobby guest book — every signature is preserved for future visitors.

guests.name: Chip Chandler
guests.note: Guest services — first signature in the book.

guests.name: Clerk Carmen
guests.note: Front desk — welcome to the bay.

guests.name: Barkeep Betty
guests.note: Lobby bar, west side. Drinks on the house — eventually.

guests.name: Pavilion Paula
guests.note: Racing Pavilion northeast corner. Long shots welcome.

guests.name: Tourist Tina
guests.note: Slot aisle witness. The gold tiles near the plants hide stories.

guests.name: Steve Harvey
guests.note: Table 9 and the Pavilion. Survey says… enjoy your stay.

guests.name: Dealer Meryl Screech
guests.note: Table 7 — the felt remembers every hand.

guests.name: Dealer Judi Bench
guests.note: Hold'em pit. Read the room, respect the rake.

guests.name: Dealer Jennifer Lawless
guests.note: Rotates between blackjack, poker, and roulette.

guests.name: Marcus Chen
guests.note: Panorama Suite 4207 — here for the bay views.

guests.name: Elena Vasquez
guests.note: Chairman Penthouse 5101 — high roller, higher standards.

guests.name: The Midnight Regular
guests.note: Anonymous but unforgettable. See you on the floor.
